text.title: Embedding Model Selection for RAG Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use it when the input shape changes or before scaling a pilot.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the corpus need semantic similarity beyond keyword matching?

conclusion.verdict: Use BM25 / lexical search; do not embed.

branch.when: semantic_needed == true AND multilingual == false AND production_scale == true

conclusion.verdict: Pick text-embedding-3-large at 1024 dims; lock in decision-record.
Pick text-embedding-3-small at 512 dims; record metadata.

example.trace: semantic_needed=true → multilingual=false → production_scale=true → text-embedding-3-large@1024 dims, locked.
